\tzpentry{ID3625}{Field Strength Evolution Equation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3625 introduces Field Strength Evolution Equation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \dot{x}(t) = F(x(t)) + G(x(t))\,w\!\bigl(t;u(t)\bigr), \end{equation}
